description: 48-team 2026 FIFA World Cup roster enriched with wiki, FIFA ranking, ELO, xG, history

defects.reason: 12 teams did not qualify for 2018 or 2022 WC; StatsBomb only covers those two tournaments
defects.fill_strategy: Use group/continental mean xG from qualifying campaign data, or null-pad
defects.severity: low — expected; not a data error

defects.reason: Team has < 10 matches in martj42 dataset; recent_form requires 10 A-matches
defects.fill_strategy: Use all available matches or null; do not impute with group mean

defects.reason: Wikipedia REST API returned a disambiguation page (e.g. New Zealand ambiguous term)
defects.fill_strategy: Re-scrape with action API (S1 action endpoint) or use raw wikitext fallback

defects.reason: Live FIFA ranking could not be extracted from wiki; baseline used instead
defects.fill_strategy: Source from official FIFA rankings API; baseline is acceptable placeholder

leakage_check.note: xg_2018_2022 comes from PAST tournaments (2018+2022), not current match. recent_form_score is a rolling window from martj42 historical data. All features are safe for pre-match prediction — no in-game stats included.

recommendations: Re-scrape New Zealand and Sweden wiki_extract with action API (disambiguation pages)
Decide on xG null-fill strategy: group mean vs. continental mean vs. null
Add FIFA 2022 technical report PDF extraction (S7) for tactical features
Add tactical text corpus files (S8) for entity-tactic triples
Evaluate FBref injury data before pre-tournament model training
